description: Fluor Corporation is the largest publicly traded engineering and construction company in the US (Fortune 500 #265). Three segments: Energy Solutions (oil, gas, chemicals, power), Urban Solutions (infrastructure, mining, advanced technologies), and Mission Solutions (government/defense). Founded 1912, HQ Irving TX. New CEO Jim Breuer effective May 1 2025 succeeding David Constable. Revenue $16.3B FY2024, ~27,000 employees globally.

ai_initiatives: Microsoft Dynamics 365 FastTrack AI and Copilot program — confirmed via LinkedIn IT team
AI and digitalization named as CPO mandate since October 2024
Fluor ranked #1 on Data Centre Magazine top construction companies building data centers — active in data center EPC
CFIHOS (Capital Facilities Information HandOver Specification) digital standards — active implementation
tech_signals.ai_maturity_notes: No standalone CIO — IT under CPO Raj Desai since October 2024 (+2 new IT leadership signal). Microsoft Dynamics 365 + Copilot AI program confirmed (+3). Data center EPC market leadership signals technology investment capacity (+2). New CEO May 2025 = IT budget reset (+2). Kyndryl confirmed as incumbent MSP (May 2026). Score 10 — below ≥15 threshold.
